subject: fix(ux): add contextual endpoint labels to all sliders
body:
Replaced abstract labels (X/Y, percentages) with plain-language endpoint
hints so non-technical users understand what each slider direction does.
Examples: Left↔Right, Top↔Bottom, None↔Full, Sharp↔Blurry, Dark↔Bright,
Small↔Large. Label + value stays above, hints flank the slider below.

Tags: ux, accessibility, sliders, user-facing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: restructure-panel-layout
Semver: patch
